violations.text: Rice, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2025
Mixer paddle for the stand mixer was not in good repair, coating observed peeling. Mixer paddle taken out of service. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2025
The dish machine at the bar was not dispensing sanitizer. PIC contacted service; scheduled for later today. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2025
